name: Synthetic score methodology — not investment guidance
verification_note: Made-up factor weights, grade anchors, valuation assumptions, source rules, market-cap bands, and flags used only for deterministic software tests.

factors.label: Synthetic financial strength
factors.description: Synthetic evidence factor for automated tests only.
evidence_requirements: Retain the synthetic financial statement evidence used for the grade.
Document the synthetic calculations and reconcile the assigned grade.

grade_anchors.10: Synthetic materially adverse financial-strength evidence anchor.

factors.label: Synthetic official macro factor
factors.description: Synthetic government-source factor for automated tests only.
evidence_requirements: Retain one synthetic approved government-tailwind review.
Document the synthetic transmission mechanism to the company.

grade_anchors.1: Synthetic strong direct macro-tailwind evidence anchor.
grade_anchors.7: Synthetic weak or uncertain macro evidence anchor.

valuation_policy.graham_basis_note: Synthetic explanation of the Graham coefficient and its test-only limitations.
valuation_policy.dcf_review_note: Synthetic DCF review discipline covering scenarios, assumptions, and rejection of unsupported values.

market_cap_band_note: Synthetic rationale for deterministic market-cap category tests only.
microcap_adjustment_note: Synthetic rationale for deterministic red and green adjustment tests only.
